description: Outcome enum for policy-decision shapes (AccessDecision.outcome, SignerCompetenceResult.outcome). 5 substrate-agnostic members.

anyOf.description: Action is permitted; consumer may proceed.
Action is denied; consumer MUST NOT proceed.
Decision deferred to a human or higher-trust process. Consumer holds the action.
Cryptographic / class-validation step succeeded. Pair with another field for the policy verdict.
Cryptographic / class-validation step failed. Distinct from policy-level deny.
